calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler
Petitioners: Yudith Yesenia Gomez Soto and Mohamed Isamail, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jazmin Amirah Ismail-Gomez, were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Amirah Mohamed Ismail.
Decree signed in open court.
